suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that stock klines use normalized six-digit symbol_code values while stock_basic stores exchange-suffixed ts_code values, so joins must normalize symbols first.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: src/services/kline_service.py:89 normalizes stock symbol_code via NormalizedTicker; src/api/routes_health.py:379 maps stock_basic.ts_code to plain symbols with ts_code.split('.')[0] before applying listing-date gap filtering.
